campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review the Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's investment report for March 2026, adopted a new policy about how city property can be used, and discussed efforts to fill city job openings and keep current employees.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and strategies to recruit and retain staff

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing to get resident feedback on plans to clean up hazardous conditions on properties identified by the County, then voted to approve the cleanup work. The Council also adopted a new technology policy for the city and approved a process for residents to request reasonable accommodations from the city.
keyTopics: Hazardous property abatement ordered on County-identified properties
New Technology Disruption Policy adopted
Process established for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial records from their previous meeting and review the town's finances for March 2026. They also authorized several spending decisions, including accepting a donation of emergency medical equipment, approving a paving contract, applying for state grants, and planning projects for the upcoming fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved road paving contract with O'Grady Paving
Received donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED) equipment
Submitted grant applications for state funding
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment report
Finalized list of capital projects for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agenda items for late May and early June 2026. The council cancelled its May 26 meeting and reviewed draft items for the June 2 meeting, while also updating work plans for neighborhood services and open government.
keyTopics: May 26, 2026 meeting cancelled
June 2, 2026 draft agenda items under review
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan update
City-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve meeting minutes and hear public comments. The main business item was selecting and recommending applicants for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee applications for 2026-27 reviewed and candidates recommended
Public comment period held for residents to address the council
Meeting minutes from previous session approved

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, where they recognized Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting included approval of April meeting minutes and standard council procedures.
keyTopics: Recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month
Recognition of Affordable Housing Month
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element, which is part of the long-range community plan through 2040. The council also recognized the Public Works Department for their work on roads, trees, facilities, and environmental programs during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update for the 2015-2040 General Plan
Recognition of Public Works Department divisions (streets, sidewalks, trees, sustainability, facilities)
Celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander Month
One or more agenda items postponed to a future meeting

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara held a special meeting of the Station Area Task Force on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss items related to the station area. The meeting was open to the public both in person and via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting
Meeting held at City Hall (1500 Warburton Avenue)
Public participation available in-person and online via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, to address several land development and city management matters. Key actions included approving changes to a development permit and map for a specific project, confirming assessments related to property improvements, and permanently appointing a new City Manager.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance and zoning code amendments being considered
Site development permit changes and tentative map approval for a project
Property assessment confirmation and ordering process
Permanent City Manager appointment

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed guiding principles for electrification programs designed to help the city comply with air quality regulations from the Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update and progress
Proposed principles to guide future electrification assistance programs
Compliance with Air District regulations
Staff presentation on electrification program details
